Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BadIndex
    Runtime exception indicating an invalid numeric index or id.
    Child
    Retrieves the nth child element of a specified parent element.
    Children
    Lists all children of a specified element with their attributes and ids.
    Closing
    Closes the currently open file and clears the editor context.
    Command
     
    CommandExecution
    Registry and factory for available command implementations.
    Context
    Holds runtime state shared across commands: current element, filename, storage.
    Deleting
    Deletes an attribute from a specified element by key.
    Element
    Represents an XML-like element node with attributes, children and text.
    Engine
    Interactive command loop that reads user input and dispatches commands.
    Exiting
    Terminates the running JVM process immediately.
    FileManager
    Abstraction for file operations used by the application.
    FinderOfElem
    Utility class to find an element by its resolved id within a tree.
    Help
    Provides a multi-line help text describing available commands.
    IdMaker
    Utility for generating the next unique resolved id for an element tree.
    Main
    Application entry point that initializes context, root element and engine.
    NewChild
    Creates a new child element under a specified parent element.
    NoElement
    Runtime exception indicating a requested element was not found.
    NoFile
    Runtime exception indicating no file is currently open or available.
    Open
    Opens or references a file by name for subsequent operations.
    Printing
    Prints the entire loaded XML document (element tree) as formatted XML.
    SaveStorage
    Concrete FileManager that delegates load/save to XmlLoader.
    Saving
    Saves the current in-memory document to the file referenced by context.
    SavingAs
    Saves the current document under a new filename and updates context.
    Select
    Selects and returns the value of a named attribute from an element.
    Setting
    Sets or replaces an attribute value on a specified element.
    Text
    Gets or sets the textContent of an Element identified by its resolved id.
    WrongCommand
    Runtime exception indicating an unrecognized or invalid command.
    WrongPlace
    Runtime exception indicating an XML parsing location or structural error.
    XmlLoader
    Responsible for serializing and deserializing Element trees to/from XML text.
    XmlParser
    Lightweight XML parser that converts textual XML into Element objects.
